name: combatr
description: Self-hosted D&D 5e encounter builder and combat tracker — SRD 5.1 content, JSON storage, no database

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w client" "tsx server/src/index.ts"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w client && npm run test -w server
